# Special Algorithms → Inverse Cosine Squared

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Special Algorithms → Inverse Cosine Squared

Inverse Cosine Squared

Instruction Type and Width        Instruction description
                                  Performs two linear piece wise estimations on two sources. The
                                  multiplicand and addend are obtained from a fixed table. The
Vector Inverse Cosine Squared
                                  sources are a 16-bit real signed positive numbers. The
                                  destinations are 16-bit signed numbers.
